summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 Operational Control Surfaces. All 33 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for Catalog Workspace, Commission Engine, and VendorOps Vendors tab - all features working correctly.

issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - appears on Supply Review page and ProductsTab. Minor, does not affect functionality.
Beneficiary column shows '—' for all records instead of actual beneficiary names. Data exists in DB but beneficiary_name field may not be populated.

action_items: Consider populating beneficiary_name in commission records for better display in Commission Engine table
critical_code_review_comments: Catalog Workspace stats endpoint correctly returns categories with display_mode, commercial_mode, sourcing_mode, and product_count
Finance routes properly require JWT auth and restrict to admin/finance_manager/sales_manager roles
Commission stats aggregation correctly calculates total_earned, pending_amount, paid_amount, beneficiary_count
Cash flow endpoint correctly groups payments by status
VendorsTab correctly shows KPI strip (Total Vendors, Active, Types) and profile drawer on row click
Category cards correctly display all three mode badges (Visual/List&Quote, Fixed Price/Request Quote/Hybrid, Single/Competitive)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing DB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Operational Control Surfaces fully tested. Catalog Workspace shows 12 categories, 51 products (13 active), 14 pending review, 28 quote items. Commission Engine shows TZS 45,842.6 total earned with 22 commission records. VendorOps has 12 vendors (9 active). All APIs return real data from MongoDB.

22 commission rows displayed - PASSED

Drawer shows Type, Email, Phone, Status, Categories, Joined fields - PASSED

catalog_workspace_stats.details: GET /api/admin/catalog-workspace/stats returns products=51, active_products=13, categories with display_mode/commercial_mode/sourcing_mode/product_count, pricing_issues, pending_review, quote_items

finance_commissions.details: GET /api/admin/finance/commissions returns real commission records with status filter support

finance_commission_stats.details: GET /api/admin/finance/commission-stats returns total_earned=45842.6, pending_amount, paid_amount, beneficiary_count=1

finance_cash_flow.details: GET /api/admin/finance/cash-flow returns total_revenue, by_status breakdown, pending/approved/rejected summaries

catalog_workspace_ui.details: KPI strip with 6 metrics, 12 category cards with mode badges, health alerts bar, quick actions all working

commission_engine_ui.details: KPI strip with 4 metrics, filterable table with 6 columns, 22 commission records displayed

vendor_ops_vendors_tab.details: KPI strip (Total=12, Active=9, Types=1), vendors table, profile drawer on row click
